audit_items.proof_trace: Functions cell_to_coset_evals and coset_evals_to_cell are not implemented in Lighthouse codebase. They are specification-level functions from Fulu (PeerDAS) spec implemented in external rust_eth_kzg library v0.9.0. Lighthouse only uses high-level KZG operations (compute_cells, verify_cell_proof_batch, recover_cells_and_kzg_proofs) that delegate to the external library. The inverse relationship invariant must be verified in rust_eth_kzg itself, not Lighthouse.
